calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-19-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, APR-19-2006: DAVID J. BRILLANT, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; GENERAL MANAGER MR. BRUCE SANDIFER IS ALSO PRESENT ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY DAVID J. LAZERWITZ, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT ELIZABETH FRANTES, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES; D-206 TRIAL DATE REMOVED. TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD AND INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING REGARDING THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 402 BROADWAY, #162, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133: DEFENDANT ELIZABETH FRANTES WILL REMAIN IN POSSESSION OF THE SUBJECT PROPERTY; THE AMOUNT OF $165.00 IS DUE COMMENCING SATURDAY, APR-22-2006; DEFENDANT IS TO CONTINUE TO PAY ALL DUE AMOUNTS FROM APR-03-06 TO APR-22-06; THE TOTAL AMOUNT DUE IS $1,634.96; THE DEFENDANT ELIZABETH FRANTES IS TO PAY THE AMOUNT OF $800.00 ON TODAY'S DATE, WEDNESDAY, APR-19-2006 AND THEN SECURE A LOAN FOR THE REMAINING BALANCE DUE FROM RADO LOAN BY MAY-10-2006. IF THE DEFENDANT BREACHES THE STIPULATED AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF WILL SEEK FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE AND DAMAGES AS SET FORTH IN THE AGREEMENT. BY MAY-03-2006 THE DEFENDANT IS TO ALLOW EXTERMINATORS TO SPRAY THE ABOVE MENTIONED PREMISES; PARTIES AGREE TO A MUTUAL WAIVER AS PER SECTION 1542; PLAINTIFF TO DISMISS NO LATER THAN SIX MONTHS FROM THE DATE OF THE AGREEMENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT INFORM THE COURT THEY UNDERSTAND AND CONCUR WITH THE STIPULATION/JUDGMENT STATED FOR THE RECORD THIS DATE, WEDNESDAY, APR-19-2006.

JUDGE PRO TEM SANDRA MC NABB; REPORTED: SONIA WONG, CSR #11288; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (218/206).
